allow: PowerShell($keystore = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.android\\debug.keystore"; $keytool = Get-ChildItem "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Android Studio\\jbr\\bin\\keytool.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr\\bin\\keytool.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\..\\keytool.exe" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object -First 1 -ExpandProperty FullName; if \(-not $keytool\) { $keytool = \(Get-Command keytool -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source }; Write-Output "keytool: $keytool"; if \(Test-Path $keystore\) { Write-Output "keystore exists" } else { Write-Output "keystore MISSING" })

PowerShell($keytool = "C:\\Program Files\\Android\\Android Studio\\jbr\\bin\\keytool.exe"; $keystore = "$env:USERPROFILE\\.android\\debug.keystore"; & $keytool -list -v -keystore $keystore -alias androiddebugkey -storepass android -keypass android | Select-String "SHA1|SHA256")
